requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Transport — UN 38.3 and Lithium Battery Shipping
requirement_topic.zh: 危险品运输——UN 38.3与锂电池运输
requirement_topic.zht: 危險品運輸——UN 38.3與鋰電池運輸

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries are classified as dangerous goods (Class 9) for transport. Before being shipped internationally to South Africa, each cell and battery type must pass the UN 38.3 tests in the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria (Part III, sub-section 38.3), covering altitude simulation, thermal cycling, vibration, shock, external short-circuit, impact/crush, overcharge, and forced discharge. Sea freight to Durban or Cape Town follows the IMDG Code; air freight follows the IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations / ICAO Technical Instructions. Consignments require a UN 38.3 test summary, correct UN numbers (UN3480/UN3481 for lithium-ion, UN3090/UN3091 for lithium-metal), proper packing (packing instructions P903 etc.), Class 9 lithium battery hazard marks/labels, and a dangerous goods declaration where applicable. South Africa applies these international transport rules at its ports and airports.
summary.zh: 锂电芯及电池在运输中归类为危险品（第9类）。在国际运往南非前，每种电芯及电池型号须通过《联合国试验和标准手册》（第三部分38.3小节）的UN 38.3测试，涵盖高度模拟、热循环、振动、冲击、外部短路、撞击/挤压、过充及强制放电。海运至德班或开普敦遵循《国际海运危险货物规则》（IMDG）；空运遵循IATA危险品规则/ICAO技术细则。货物须备有UN 38.3测试摘要、正确的UN编号（锂离子UN3480/UN3481，锂金属UN3090/UN3091）、正确包装（包装说明P903等）、第9类锂电池危险标记/标签，以及适用时的危险品申报。南非在其港口及机场适用这些国际运输规则。
summary.zht: 鋰電芯及電池在運輸中歸類為危險品（第9類）。在國際運往南非前，每種電芯及電池型號須通過《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》（第三部分38.3小節）的UN 38.3測試，涵蓋高度模擬、熱循環、振動、衝擊、外部短路、撞擊/擠壓、過充及強制放電。海運至德班或開普敦遵循《國際海運危險貨物規則》（IMDG）；空運遵循IATA危險品規則/ICAO技術細則。貨物須備有UN 38.3測試摘要、正確的UN編號（鋰離子UN3480/UN3481，鋰金屬UN3090/UN3091）、正確包裝（包裝說明P903等）、第9類鋰電池危險標記/標籤，以及適用時的危險品申報。南非在其港口及機場適用這些國際運輸規則。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, sub-section 38.3 (UN 38.3) — lithium battery transport tests
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) — sea freight to South African ports
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations / ICAO Technical Instructions — air freight

summary.en: China applies the same international transport regime. Chinese exporters already prepare UN 38.3 test summaries and ship lithium batteries as Class 9 dangerous goods under the IMDG Code and IATA DGR. China additionally requires domestic measures such as the identification appraisal report for dangerous goods packaging and, for export by sea, a goods packaging performance/use appraisal handled by Chinese inspection authorities (formerly CIQ, now GACC). The UN 38.3 requirement itself is identical because it derives from the UN Model Regulations, so a properly prepared Chinese UN 38.3 summary is broadly usable for South African shipments — this row is largely aligned between markets.
summary.zh: 中国适用相同的国际运输制度。中国出口商已准备UN 38.3测试摘要，并按IMDG规则及IATA DGR将锂电池作为第9类危险品运输。中国另要求国内措施，如危险货物包装的鉴定评估报告，以及海运出口时由中国检验机构（原CIQ，现GACC）办理的货物包装性能/使用鉴定。UN 38.3要求本身因源自联合国示范条例而完全一致，故妥善准备的中国UN 38.3摘要大体可用于南非货运——本行在两个市场之间基本一致。
summary.zht: 中國適用相同的國際運輸制度。中國出口商已準備UN 38.3測試摘要，並按IMDG規則及IATA DGR將鋰電池作為第9類危險品運輸。中國另要求國內措施，如危險貨物包裝的鑑定評估報告，以及海運出口時由中國檢驗機構（原CIQ，現GACC）辦理的貨物包裝性能/使用鑑定。UN 38.3要求本身因源自聯合國示範條例而完全一致，故妥善準備的中國UN 38.3摘要大體可用於南非貨運——本行在兩個市場之間基本一致。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, 38.3) — same international basis
GACC/CIQ dangerous goods packaging performance and use appraisal for sea export
GB 19521 / GB 21966 — Chinese dangerous goods and lithium battery transport classification standards

gap.en: Transport is the most internationally harmonised row: both China and South Africa rely on UN 38.3, the IMDG Code, and IATA DGR. The practical gaps for a China-to-South Africa shipment are documentary and logistical rather than standards-based: (1) the UN 38.3 test summary must match the exact cell/battery model shipped and be current; (2) correct UN numbers, Class 9 marks/labels, and packing instructions must be applied for the chosen mode (sea to Durban/Cape Town or air); (3) a dangerous goods declaration and any carrier-specific state of charge limits for air must be observed; (4) Chinese export-side packaging appraisal does not replace correct documentation accepted by the carrier and South African port handlers. No South-Africa-specific transport test beyond UN 38.3 is generally required.
gap.zh: 运输是国际协调程度最高的一行：中国与南非均依赖UN 38.3、IMDG规则及IATA DGR。中国至南非货运的实际差距属文件与物流层面而非标准层面：（1）UN 38.3测试摘要须与所运的确切电芯/电池型号一致且为最新；（2）须按所选运输方式（海运至德班/开普敦或空运）正确适用UN编号、第9类标记/标签及包装说明；（3）须遵守危险品申报及空运适用的承运人特定荷电状态限制；（4）中国出口端包装鉴定不能替代承运人及南非港口操作方接受的正确文件。一般无须UN 38.3之外的南非专属运输测试。
gap.zht: 運輸是國際協調程度最高的一行：中國與南非均依賴UN 38.3、IMDG規則及IATA DGR。中國至南非貨運的實際差距屬文件與物流層面而非標準層面：（1）UN 38.3測試摘要須與所運的確切電芯/電池型號一致且為最新；（2）須按所選運輸方式（海運至德班/開普敦或空運）正確適用UN編號、第9類標記/標籤及包裝說明；（3）須遵守危險品申報及空運適用的承運人特定荷電狀態限制；（4）中國出口端包裝鑑定不能替代承運人及南非港口操作方接受的正確文件。一般無須UN 38.3之外的南非專屬運輸測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 testing and dangerous goods documentation/packaging/labelling under the IMDG Code (sea) and IATA DGR / ICAO TI (air) are required to ship lithium batteries into South Africa
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — UN 38.3 and dangerous goods transport rules apply to lithium battery export from China; additional GACC/CIQ packaging appraisal applies to sea export

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lithium battery transport into South Africa follows the same internationally harmonised rules used for exports from China: UN 38.3 testing, the IMDG Code for sea freight to Durban or Cape Town, and IATA DGR / ICAO TI for air freight. This is the row with the least standards gap, but exporters must ensure the UN 38.3 summary matches the exact model, apply correct UN numbers, Class 9 labels and packing instructions, and provide a compliant dangerous goods declaration. Chinese export-side packaging appraisal does not replace carrier-accepted transport documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 锂电池运入南非遵循与从中国出口相同的国际协调规则：UN 38.3测试、海运至德班或开普敦的IMDG规则，以及空运的IATA DGR/ICAO TI。本行标准差距最小，但出口商须确保UN 38.3摘要与确切型号一致，正确适用UN编号、第9类标签及包装说明，并提供合规的危险品申报。中国出口端包装鉴定不能替代承运人接受的运输文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 鋰電池運入南非遵循與從中國出口相同的國際協調規則：UN 38.3測試、海運至德班或開普敦的IMDG規則，以及空運的IATA DGR/ICAO TI。本行標準差距最小，但出口商須確保UN 38.3摘要與確切型號一致，正確適用UN編號、第9類標籤及包裝說明，並提供合規的危險品申報。中國出口端包裝鑑定不能替代承運人接受的運輸文件。

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Manual of Tests and Criteria
